runes.name: Press the Attack
runes.description: Hitting an enemy champion with 3 consecutive basic attacks deals bonus adaptive damage and makes them vulnerable, increasing damage from all sources.

runes.name: Lethal Tempo
runes.description: Gain attack speed for 6 seconds when striking at least one enemy champion with each attack. This effect stacks up to 6 times.

runes.name: Fleet Footwork
runes.description: Attacking and moving builds Energy stacks. At 100 stacks, your next attack is Energized and heals you and grants increased movement speed.

runes.name: Conqueror
runes.description: Basic attacks or spells that deal damage to an enemy champion grant 2 stacks of Adaptive Force for 5 seconds, stacking up to 12 times. When fully stacked, heal for a portion of damage dealt.

runes.name: Overheal
runes.description: Excess healing on you becomes a shield, for up to 10% of your maximum health.

runes.name: Triumph
runes.description: Takedowns restore 5% of your missing health and grant an additional 20 gold.

runes.name: Presence of Mind
runes.description: Damaging an enemy champion increases your mana regeneration. Takedowns restore mana or energy.

runes.name: Legend: Alacrity
runes.description: Gain 3% attack speed plus an additional 1.5% for every Legend stack (max 10 stacks). Earn stacks for champion takedowns, epic monster takedowns, and large monster kills.

runes.name: Legend: Tenacity
runes.description: Gain 5% tenacity plus an additional 2.5% for every Legend stack (max 10 stacks).

runes.name: Legend: Bloodline
runes.description: Gain 0.35% life steal for every Legend stack (max 10 stacks). At maximum stacks, gain 100 max health.

runes.name: Coup de Grace
runes.description: Deal 8% more damage to champions who have less than 40% health.

runes.name: Cut Down
runes.description: Deal 5% to 15% more damage to champions with more maximum health than you.

runes.name: Last Stand
runes.description: Deal 5% to 11% increased damage to champions while you are below 60% health.

runes.name: Electrocute
runes.description: Hitting a champion with 3 separate attacks or abilities within 3 seconds deals bonus adaptive damage.

runes.name: Predator
runes.description: Enchant your boots with an active effect that grants a burst of movement speed and causes your next attack or ability to deal bonus adaptive damage.

runes.name: Dark Harvest
runes.description: Damaging a champion below 50% health deals adaptive damage and harvests their soul, permanently increasing Dark Harvest damage.

runes.name: Hail of Blades
runes.description: Gain 110% attack speed for the first 3 attacks against enemy champions. No attack speed limit.

runes.name: Cheap Shot
runes.description: Damaging champions with impaired movement or actions deals bonus true damage.

runes.name: Taste of Blood
runes.description: Heal when you damage an enemy champion.

runes.name: Sudden Impact
runes.description: After exiting stealth or using a dash, leap, blink, or teleport, gain lethality and magic penetration for 5 seconds.

runes.name: Zombie Ward
runes.description: Takedowns on enemy wards cause a friendly Zombie Ward to spawn. Gain adaptive force for each Zombie Ward spawned plus bonus when you complete your collection.

runes.name: Ghost Poro
runes.description: When your wards expire, they leave behind a Ghost Poro that grants vision. Gain adaptive force for each Ghost Poro plus bonus when you complete your collection.

runes.name: Eyeball Collection
runes.description: Collect eyeballs for champion takedowns. Gain adaptive force per eyeball, plus bonus upon completing your collection.

runes.name: Treasure Hunter
runes.description: Gain additional gold the first time you collect a unique takedown.

runes.name: Ingenious Hunter
runes.description: Unique takedowns grant permanent item haste for your item actives and item passives.

runes.name: Relentless Hunter
runes.description: Unique takedowns grant permanent out-of-combat movement speed.

runes.name: Summon Aery
runes.description: Damaging enemy champions sends Aery to them, dealing bonus adaptive damage. Empowering or protecting allies sends Aery to them, shielding them.

runes.name: Arcane Comet
runes.description: Damaging a champion with an ability hurls a damaging comet at their location. Ability hits reduce the cooldown.

runes.name: Phase Rush
runes.description: Hitting an enemy champion with 3 attacks or separate abilities within 4 seconds grants a burst of movement speed and slow resistance.

runes.name: Nullifying Orb
runes.description: Gain a magic damage shield when taken to low health by magic damage.

runes.name: Manaflow Band
runes.description: Hitting an enemy champion with an ability permanently increases your maximum mana. After reaching the cap, restore a percentage of missing mana.

runes.name: Nimbus Cloak
runes.description: After casting a Summoner Spell, gain a burst of movement speed that lasts for 2 seconds.

runes.name: Transcendence
runes.description: Gain bonuses upon reaching levels 5, 8, and 11. Gain CDR at levels 5 and 8 and takedowns reduce remaining ability cooldowns at level 11.

runes.name: Celerity
runes.description: All movement speed bonuses are 7% more effective on you and gain 1% movement speed.

runes.name: Absolute Focus
runes.description: While above 70% health, gain extra adaptive force.

runes.name: Scorch
runes.description: Your next damaging ability hit sets champions on fire, dealing bonus magic damage after 1 second.

runes.name: Waterwalking
runes.description: Gain movement speed and adaptive force when in the river.

runes.name: Gathering Storm
runes.description: Every 10 minutes, gain increasing amounts of adaptive force.

runes.name: Grasp of the Undying
runes.description: Every 4 seconds in combat, your next basic attack against a champion deals bonus magic damage, heals you, and permanently increases your health.

runes.name: Aftershock
runes.description: After immobilizing an enemy champion, gain a burst of armor and magic resist. After a short delay, deal magic damage to nearby enemies.

runes.name: Guardian
runes.description: Guard allies within range. If you or a guarded ally would take damage, shield both of you and grant movement speed.

runes.name: Demolish
runes.description: Charge up a powerful attack against towers over 3 seconds while within range. The charged attack deals bonus physical damage.

runes.name: Font of Life
runes.description: Impairing the movement of an enemy champion marks them. Allied champions who attack marked enemies heal over 2 seconds.

runes.name: Shield Bash
runes.description: While shielded, gain bonus armor and magic resist. Whenever you gain a new shield, your next basic attack deals bonus adaptive damage.

runes.name: Conditioning
runes.description: After 12 minutes, gain bonus armor and magic resist and increase your total armor and magic resist by 3%.

runes.name: Second Wind
runes.description: After taking damage from an enemy champion, heal over 10 seconds. Bonus healing based on missing health.

runes.name: Bone Plating
runes.description: After taking damage from an enemy champion, the next 3 spells or attacks you receive from them deal reduced damage.

runes.name: Overgrowth
runes.description: Absorb life essence from monsters or enemy minions that die near you, permanently gaining health. After absorbing sufficient essence, gain additional max health.

runes.name: Revitalize
runes.description: Heals and shields you cast or receive are 5% stronger. They are increased by an additional 10% on targets below 40% health.

runes.name: Unflinching
runes.description: Gain tenacity and slow resist. These values increase based on your missing health.

runes.name: Glacial Augment
runes.description: Immobilizing an enemy champion causes 3 glacial rays to emanate from them, creating a frozen zone that slows enemies and reduces their damage.

runes.name: Unsealed Spellbook
runes.description: Swap one of your equipped Summoner Spells to a different one. After using the swapped spell, your next swap has a reduced cooldown. Each unique Summoner Spell you use permanently increases the swap cooldown reduction.

runes.name: First Strike
runes.description: If you initiate champion combat, gain gold and deal bonus true damage for 3 seconds. Bonus damage dealt is converted to bonus gold.

runes.name: Hextech Flashtraption
runes.description: While Flash is on cooldown, it is replaced by Hexflash. Hexflash: Channel for 2 seconds to blink to a new location.

runes.name: Magical Footwear
runes.description: You get free Slightly Magical Boots at 12 minutes (reduced by 45 seconds per takedown). Slightly Magical Boots give you an additional 10 movement speed.

runes.name: Perfect Timing
runes.description: Gain a free Commencing Stopwatch at 14 minutes (reduced by 2 minutes per takedown). The Stopwatch contributes to Zhonya's Hourglass, Guardian Angel, and Gargoyle Stoneplate.

runes.name: Future's Market
runes.description: You can enter debt to buy items. The amount you can borrow increases over time. Lending Fee: 50 gold.

runes.name: Minion Dematerializer
runes.description: Start the game with 3 Minion Dematerializers. Killing minions with the item increases your damage against that type of minion permanently.

runes.name: Biscuit Delivery
runes.description: Gain a Total Biscuit of Everlasting Will every 2 minutes until 6 minutes. Biscuits restore health and mana and permanently increase your mana cap.

runes.name: Cosmic Insight
runes.description: Gain 18 Summoner Spell Haste and 10 Item Haste.

runes.name: Approach Velocity
runes.description: Gain bonus movement speed toward nearby enemy champions that are movement impaired. This bonus is increased for champions you impair.

runes.name: Time Warp Tonic
runes.description: Consuming a potion or biscuit grants 50% of its health or mana restoration immediately and grants movement speed for the duration.
